titleStmt.title: SII 9.591: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 591. (A.R. No. 794 of 1917.) ON A BOULDER UNDER THE TANK-BUND TO THE SOUTH-EAST OF THE VILLAGE, BUDILI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1459, Viḷambi, Māgha, śu. 2, Bu[dhavāra] corresponding to A.D. 1539 January 22, Wednesday, in the reign of Achyutarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Chikka-Narasappayya, aḷiya (son-in-law) of Ananta-Ayya, repaired the tank at Būdali and, purchasing some land under the same tank, made a gift of it for the service of the god Kēśavadēva of the village, consecrated at the time of Narasaṇa-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē nama [ḥ.*] svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁ
gaḷu 1456 neya viḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada māgha su 2 bu śrīmatu rājādhirāja rājaparamēsvara
śrīvīrapratāpa Acutarāyamahārāyarū pruthvīrājyaṁgeyyuvalu Ānegōḍa rāmacaṁ
AnaṁtaAyyanavara Aḷiya cikkanarasappayyanavarū bhūdaliya kēśavadēvarige krayakke koṁḍu koṭṭa
dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare prāku narasaṇanāyakaAyyanavarakāladalli kaṭisida narasayana
būdaliya kēśavadēvarige kuṁṭeyaliha mūḍa gaddeyaṁ dēvara nayivēdyake Aṁgaraṁ
gavaibhavake Ā kuṁṭeyanu sarvvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi koyla naḍavahāge
nadalū Ā kuṁṭe Oḍadu hōgi khilavāgi yiralāgi
kaṭisuvarārū Illade hāḷuvaridu yiralāgi nāu vicārisi
Ā kuṁṭe Ageyisi Acutarāyarige puṇyavāgabēkeṁdu kuṁṭe
kaṭisi Ā kuṁṭeya keḷage hostāgi Acukaṭṭanū kaṭṭisi dēvara nayi
vēdyagaḷige pūrvadavaru hēge naḍasikoṁḍu baṁdarō Ā
maṟiyādeyallē Adē mānyadallē naḍasikoṁḍu baṁdē
vendu Ā kuṁṭeyanū kaṭṭisteU dēvara dīpā
rādhanege Ā kuṁṭege baḍagala holananu
pūrvadali naḍava dē va ga 20 hoṁnu
hola Ā holadoḷage
holaṁnu veva
sāya rēkhe māḍi dēvarige dīpārā
dhaneyanū naḍasūdu yeṁdu koṭa
dharmmaśāsana �yo dēvara Oḍavege Ārū ta
pidarū taṁma taṁde tāyanū vāraṇā
silli koṁda pāpakke hōharū .
taṁma Abhimānavanū
holamādigarige
koṭavaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.591 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
